combined_text_for_llm: What does Svetlana mean? "What does Svetlana mean? S vetlana [svet- lana] as a girls' name is of Russian and Slavic origin, and the meaning of Svetlana is ""light"". Popular in Russia. Author Svetlana Stalin. ASSOCIATED WITH russian, light Variations VARIANTS Svetlanna, Svjetlana, Swetlana CREATIVE FORMS (female) (male)MIDD

history.title: What does Svetlana mean?
history.description: "What does Svetlana mean? S vetlana [svet- lana] as a girls' name is of Russian and Slavic origin, and the meaning of Svetlana is ""light"". Popular in Russia. Author Svetlana Stalin. ASSOCIATED WITH russian, light Variations VARIANTS Svetlanna, Svjetlana, Swetlana CREATIVE FORMS (female) (male)MIDD
